prompt:
Iterate 5 times with 5 different famous websites, use the style-tracer mcp to reference 1 website each time, mimic the reference website style for designing a homepage for this project "https://github.com/AgenticBridge/style-trace" in simple html.
You need to save the artifacts in ../style-trace/examples/, open sub folders for each reference website, include the generated html, screenshot of the referenced website, and a metadata json file containing the following information:
- datetime generated
- referenced website url
- style-trace version
- prompt (this prompt)
